aggregateObjective: Maintain Zorid desktop release infrastructure, including tagged all-platform release builds and GitHub Releases based desktop auto-update.

goals.objective: Configure desktop package metadata and cross-platform Electron Builder targets.
verification: electron-builder config includes macOS, Windows, and Linux targets
package versions are 0.1.0

goals.objective: Add GitHub Actions workflow for quality-gated desktop release artifacts and draft GitHub Releases.
verification: workflow has quality, platform build, and draft release jobs
workflow triggers on v* tags and manual dispatch

goals.objective: Document release behavior and required secrets.
verification: desktop development documentation describes CI release builds and artifact targets

goals.objective: Set GitHub secrets from local Apple signing and notarization files.
verification: gh secret list shows required secret names

goals.objective: Verify, commit, push, tag v0.1, and trigger the all-platform build.
verification: local quality gate passes
commit is pushed
tag v0.1 is pushed
GitHub Actions run starts

goals.objective: Add durable app settings and updater metadata persistence for auto-update preferences and 24-hour throttling.
constraints: Persist full app settings section objects under app.getPath('userData') without dropping existing or future keys
Add app.general.automaticallyCheckForUpdates defaulting to true alongside confirmDeletes
Persist updater metadata separately, including lastAutomaticCheckAttemptAtMs
Base the 24-hour automatic throttle on automatic check attempt start time
Manual checks do not consume or reset the automatic throttle
verification: tests cover full app settings persistence and default merging
tests cover persisted lastAutomaticCheckAttemptAtMs across restart-like reloads
targeted typecheck/tests pass for changed settings/updater metadata code

goals.objective: Implement the main-process updater service and narrow desktop bridge contract.
constraints: Only main-process code imports electron-updater
Expose serializable DTOs through preload methods/events only
Keep updater state app-global and broadcast to all BrowserWindow instances
Provide getUpdateState for late windows
Support stable releases only, autoDownload true, overlap prevention, and manual/background error distinction
Gate unsupported, unpackaged, and non-AppImage Linux builds without checking for updates
verification: tests cover updater state transitions with a mocked updater
tests cover platform/package gating including app.isPackaged and Linux AppImage detection
tests cover overlap prevention, manual/background errors, and late-window hydration
preload contract tests or type checks confirm no raw Electron/updater exposure

goals.objective: Coordinate user-confirmed restart/install with runtime shutdown.
constraints: Restart/install runs only after explicit user confirmation
Runtime disposal runs once before installer quit
Existing before-quit shutdown handling must not loop or block quitAndInstall
verification: tests cover updater install mode with runtime disposal and before-quit behavior
manual verification confirms Later keeps update ready and Restart and update invokes install path

goals.objective: Add Settings update controls, status display, non-blocking update-ready notification, and restart confirmation UI.
constraints: Settings shows current version, update support/status, auto-check toggle, manual check, restart action, and inline manual errors
Background failures do not interrupt the user
Update-ready notification is non-blocking and offers Restart to update and Later
Restart confirmation uses the approved copy and does not install automatically
Unsupported/manual package types show explanatory status
verification: renderer tests or targeted manual verification cover Settings states and notification behavior
accessibility basics are covered for status text, buttons, and confirmation flow
desktop renderer typecheck passes

goals.objective: Update Electron Builder and the existing desktop release workflow for updater metadata, NSIS, and draft-release publishing safety.
constraints: Add GitHub publish provider metadata for zorid-app/Zorid
Use Windows NSIS as the Windows updater target; MSI may remain manual only
Keep macOS zip and Linux AppImage updater-compatible artifacts
Modify .github/workflows/desktop-release.yml instead of creating a parallel workflow
Keep draft releases as the default safety gate
Upload generated updater metadata assets including latest.yml, latest-mac.yml, latest-linux.yml, and *.blockmap as generated
Fail CI if required updater metadata is missing for macOS zip, Windows NSIS, or Linux AppImage
Public Windows auto-update remains incomplete until signed NSIS artifacts are configured
verification: workflow syntax and asset patterns are reviewed
release asset assertion script/test covers required metadata names
desktop pack/build commands still pass where feasible

goals.objective: Document release/update operations and complete the final cleanup, verification, and independent review gate.
constraints: Document supported updater platforms and manual artifacts
Document draft-to-published stable release checklist
Document signing/notarization and Windows signing requirements
Document internal unsigned testing limits
Do not mark aggregate work complete until final quality gate and independent code-review/architect review are clean
verification: pnpm quality:fast passes after cleanup
targeted desktop build/package verification is recorded or explicit blockers are documented
independent code-review returns APPROVE or all findings are resolved
architecture review returns CLEAR for updater/release changes
